title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Air India Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Air India Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!
